summary: Phase 7 testing completed successfully - Superadmin Dashboard overhaul, View-As mode, Multi-station filter, and Bulk Asset Allocation all working correctly
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/dashboard/superadmin returns asset_categories, stations, departments, supervisors with pct_functional
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/superadmin?station_ids=X filters correctly
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/oversight/{user_id}/category-assets?asset_type_id=X works
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/oversight/{user_id}/category-assets?department_id=X works
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/oversight/{user_id}/category-assets?station_id=X works
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/oversight/{user_id}/category-assets returns 400 when no params provided
Backend: POST /api/admin/assets/assign-bulk assigns assets to supervisor
Backend: POST /api/admin/assets/assign-bulk unassigns assets when to_supervisor_id=null
Backend: POST /api/admin/assets/assign-bulk rejects non-supervisor with 400
Frontend: Superadmin dashboard renders all 6 summary tiles (Categories, Stations, Departments, RO, ASUP, Supervisors)
Frontend: Multi-station filter popover opens and allows station selection
Frontend: Multi-station filter updates dashboard overview when stations selected
Frontend: Asset Category drill-down opens with priority + working asset lists
Frontend: Department drill-down opens with asset breakdown
Frontend: Station drill-down opens with asset breakdown
Frontend: All drill-down views have working Back button
Frontend: Reporting Officers tab renders user rows
Frontend: Approving Supervisors tab renders user rows
Frontend: Supervisors tab renders user rows
Frontend: Clicking RO row navigates to /?as=USER_ID and shows View-As banner
Frontend: Clicking ASUP row navigates to /?as=USER_ID and shows View-As banner
Frontend: Clicking Supervisor row navigates to /?as=USER_ID and shows View-As banner
Frontend: View-As mode displays correct user dashboard (RO, ASUP, Supervisor)
Frontend: View-As banner shows 'Viewing as <name>' with role badge
Frontend: View-As 'Back to my dashboard' button returns to Superadmin dashboard
Frontend: Allocate Assets tab - Quick Assign section with asset and supervisor selects
Frontend: Allocate Assets tab - Quick Assign button works
Frontend: Allocate Assets tab - Bulk Allocate section with all filters (station, type, supervisor, search)
Frontend: Bulk Allocate - Select all visible button works
Frontend: Bulk Allocate - Selection count updates correctly
Frontend: Bulk Allocate - Search filter works
Frontend: Phase 6 feature - Notifications page still works correctly
